onset.Description: Time elapsed from the start of EEG recording. For listening events, computed by aligning the presented audio to the EEG timeline using the estimated recording delay. For covert events, directly derived from trigger-based EEG sample indices at 1200 Hz.

duration.Description: Duration of the event. For listening events, this is the duration of the aligned audio segment. For covert events, this is fixed at 5.0 s.

Levels.listening: Listening to speech stimuli presented via audio playback.

wav_onset.Description: Onset time relative to the start of the associated audio file. Set to 'n/a' for covert events.

sample.Description: EEG sample index corresponding to the event onset (onset * SamplingFrequency, where SamplingFrequency = 1200 Hz).

value.Description: Speech transcript generated by ASR. 'n/a' indicates the transcript was unavailable.
